calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Beldon Yee, #2647.

H. Nelson Meeks, Esq. appeared on behalf of himself as plaintiff in this matter.
Mr. Meeks was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Marco Antonio Cortez.
Default was entered against defendant on April 30, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 19, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff H. Nelson Meeks, and against the Defaulted Defendant Marco Antonio Cortez as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,240.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $276.54.
Costs - $365.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,881.54.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
